---
nocite: |
  @heseltine_large_2024, @gilardi_chatgpt_2023
---

# Generative Language Models I {#sec-week6}

::: {.callout-note}
## Week 6
**Lecture:** Basics of decoder-only models\
**Lab:** Introduction to HuggingFace `transformers`
:::

## Lecture

*Content to be added.*

## Lab

*Content to be added.*

## Readings

- @heseltine_large_2024
- @gilardi_chatgpt_2023
